title: calamagrostis oreophila
intro: Calamagrostis oreophila, also known as mountain grass or alpine fescue, is a species of grass that grows in high-altitude mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis oreophila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its various health benefits.
